critical.mandate: Follow all 5 design thinking phases in order
Never skip the empathy phase — it is the foundation
Generate at least 10 ideas before converging

step.title: Empathize
step.action: Guide user through empathy mapping: who are the users?
Explore what users think, feel, say, and do
Load methods from {data_path}/design-methods.csv — filter by phase=empathize
Select appropriate empathy technique (Empathy Map, User Interview, Journey Map)
Document empathy insights

step.title: Define
step.action: Synthesize empathy insights into a clear problem statement
Create Point of View statement: [User] needs [need] because [insight]
Reframe insights as How Might We questions
Confirm problem statement with user before proceeding

step.title: Ideate
step.action: Generate diverse solutions using creative techniques
Load ideation methods from design-methods.csv — filter by phase=ideate
Apply selected technique (Crazy 8s, SCAMPER, Mind Mapping, or Worst Idea)
Generate at least 10 ideas — quantity over quality
Converge: group, rank, and select top 2-3 ideas

step.title: Prototype
step.action: Define the minimal prototype to test the top idea(s)
What is the smallest thing we can build to learn the most?
Define prototype scope, materials, and timeline

step.title: Test
step.action: Design the test plan: who to test with, what success looks like
Define test scenarios and success criteria
Plan feedback collection method
